rationale: Educ. Code §21.156 governs teacher discharge/suspension under continuing contracts. It has no relation to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal, so the proposed change creates no conflict.
quote: A teacher employed under a continuing contract may be discharged at any time for good cause as determined by the board of trustees
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no overlap in subject matter.
